meaning: n.(欧洲中世纪的)骑士,爵士,武士vt.授以爵位
examples: This collection of essays is edited by Ellen Knight.
Mr Knight cannot be here, so his wife will accept the prize on his behalf.
Here, from a window, did Guinevere espy a knight standing in a woodman's cart.
Schools minister Jim Knight said all the best schools had one thing in common, "a strong, inspirational head".
And in time, Knight and DeJesus "succumbed" to "their reality, " the law enforcement source said.
